productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Printed Beige Kurtas
description: CompositionBeige and maroon kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neckline, short buttoned placket with a yoke and shimmery border, pleats emerging from the yoke and extending till the length of the kurta, and short sleeves with a shimmery borderFittingRegularWash careHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironVintage weaves, classic cuts and contemporary style - all come together in this kurta from mother earth. Crafted from cotton fabric, it offers exemplary comfort all day. Pair it with patialas or churidars and embellished slippers for an ethnic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight: 5’9”; Chest: 33”; Shoulders: 15.5”
